parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Instagram (ultimos 7 dias)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'followers', MAX(followers),
    'avg_engagement', ROUND(AVG(engagement_rate)::numeric, 2),
    'total_likes', SUM(likes),
    'total_views', SUM(views),
    'total_posts', COUNT(DISTINCT id)
  ) FROM instagram_metrics WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS instagram,

  -- TikTok (ultimos 7 dias)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'followers', MAX(followers),
    'total_views', SUM(video_views),
    'total_likes', SUM(likes),
    'avg_engagement', ROUND(AVG(engagement_rate)::numeric, 2)
  ) FROM tiktok_metrics WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS tiktok,

  -- Pinterest (ultimos 7 dias)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'impressions', SUM(impressions),
    'saves', SUM(saves),
    'clicks', SUM(outbound_clicks)
  ) FROM pinterest_metrics WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS pinterest,

  -- Meta Ads (ultimos 7 dias)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'spend', ROUND(SUM(spend)::numeric, 2),
    'impressions', SUM(impressions),
    'clicks', SUM(clicks),
    'ctr', ROUND(AVG(ctr)::numeric, 2),
    'roas', ROUND(AVG(roas)::numeric, 2),
    'conversions', SUM(conversions)
  ) FROM meta_ad_metrics WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS meta_ads,

  -- Shopify (ultimos 7 dias)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'total_orders', COUNT(*),
    'total_revenue', ROUND(SUM(total_price)::numeric, 2),
    'avg_order_value', ROUND(AVG(total_price)::numeric, 2)
  ) FROM shopify_orders WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS shopify,

  -- GA4 (ultimos 7 dias)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'sessions', SUM(sessions),
    'users', SUM(users),
    'bounce_rate', ROUND(AVG(bounce_rate)::numeric, 2),
    'conversions', SUM(conversions)
  ) FROM google_analytics_metrics WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS ga4,

  -- WhatsApp vendas (ultimos 7 dias)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'total_sales', COUNT(*),
    'total_revenue', ROUND(SUM(value)::numeric, 2)
  ) FROM whatsapp_sales WHERE sale_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS whatsapp_sales

SELECT
  -- Instagram semana anterior (pra comparacao)
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'followers', MAX(followers),
    'avg_engagement', ROUND(AVG(engagement_rate)::numeric, 2),
    'total_likes', SUM(likes),
    'total_views', SUM(views)
  ) FROM instagram_metrics WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS instagram_prev,

  -- Meta Ads semana anterior
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'spend', ROUND(SUM(spend)::numeric, 2),
    'roas', ROUND(AVG(roas)::numeric, 2),
    'conversions', SUM(conversions)
  ) FROM meta_ad_metrics WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS meta_ads_prev,

  -- Shopify semana anterior
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'total_orders', COUNT(*),
    'total_revenue', ROUND(SUM(total_price)::numeric, 2)
  ) FROM shopify_orders WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS shopify_prev

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'relatorio semanal ' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), content: Buffer.from($json.text || $json.output || '').toString('base64') }) }}
